# Forward rate N_A<sigma v> [cm^3 mol^-1 s^-1] extracted from
# parthenope3.0.f (default PIS2020 nuclear-rate selection).
# error column = sqrt((1+drate_up)/(1+drate_lo)), the full Parthenope
# 1-sigma multiplicative envelope (statistical fp/fm + systematic floor).
# NOTE: lowest 188 T9 points (below the fit validity floor, where
#   the published polynomial extrapolates non-physically) are filled by
#   log-log extrapolation; this region is dynamically frozen for BBN.
# T9                 rate                error
